title: glaucium luteum subsp. corniculatum
intro: Glaucium luteum subsp. corniculatum, also known as yellow hornpoppy or yellow gromwell, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family Papaveraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Glaucium luteum subsp. corniculatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
